headline: Is AI about to take your job? What Jamie Dimon says every American worker needs to know now
summary: Entry-level job postings are already down 35% since 2023. The JPMorgan CEO says curiosity, emotional intelligence and teamwork are among skills young workers need to survive the AI transition.

headline: How The Sigma Foods (BMV:SIGMAF A) Story Is Evolving Around Neutral Ratings And New Partnerships
summary: The latest update edges Sigma Foods’ fair value estimate from MX$20.29 to MX$20.54 per share, reflecting refined inputs in the existing model rather than a wholesale reset of expectations. Recent neutral coverage from JPMorgan and other analysts broadly treats this MX$20.54 level as in line with the current story, with both strengths and pressure points in view. Read on to see what is shaping that narrative and how you can track future shifts in the outlook for Sigma Foods. de. Analyst Price...

headline: Could JPMorgan Be Your Next Prediction Market Platform? Jamie Dimon Says 'It's Possible One Day...'
summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon has revealed that the largest U.S. bank is mulling over the idea of offering prediction market services to its customers. Speaking to CBS Evening News on Tuesday, Dimon said, “It’s possible one day we’ll do something like that.” The CEO, however, made it clear that JPMorgan would steer clear of sports or politics, unlike Kalshi and Polymarket. headline: How The Vår Energi (OB:VAR) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Guidance
summary: Vår Energi’s updated fair value estimate has moved from NOK 38.93 to NOK 44.72, putting a fresh spotlight on what analysts think the shares are worth today. That shift sits against a split analyst backdrop, with some targets in the NOK 39 to NOK 44 range and others much lower, reflecting different views on valuation and execution risk. As you read on, you will see how these price targets are being set and how to track the story as it evolves. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the...
